text: We collect your email address when you create an account to provide you with our services.

explanation: Standard choice of law provision.

explanation: Standard security practice with a clear, legitimate purpose.

text: If you are under 13, you may not use our services.

explanation: Standard enforcement of terms.

text: You are responsible for keeping your password secure.
explanation: Standard user security responsibility.

text: We may share your anonymized usage data with our analytics partners.

text: We use cookies and similar technologies to track your activity on our website.
explanation: Standard tracking, but merits awareness of how activity is monitored.

text: Our service may contain links to third-party websites not controlled by us.
explanation: Standard disclaimer, reminding you that other sites have their own rules.

text: We may contact you with promotional offers from our affiliates.
explanation: Allows affiliate marketing, which may result in more emails.

text: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services.
explanation: Data is kept indefinitely while the account is open.

text: You grant us a license to use your uploaded content to operate and improve our services.
explanation: Standard operating license, but gives the platform broad rights to use your content.

text: We may collect information about your device, including hardware model and OS.
explanation: Collects detailed device profiling data.

text: Our services are provided 'as is' without any warranties.
explanation: Standard disclaimer limiting their legal liability for issues.

text: We may process your data on servers located outside your home country.
explanation: Data may be subject to different privacy laws internationally.

text: We may update these terms occasionally, and your continued use implies consent.
explanation: Silent updates without active confirmation.

text: If our company is acquired, your data will be transferred to the new owners.
explanation: Your data changes hands if the company is sold.

text: We may use your personal information to personalize the advertising you see.
explanation: Uses your data for targeted advertising profiles.

text: We may sell your personal data to third-party marketing partners.
explanation: Explicitly monetizes your personal data by selling it to third parties.

text: You waive your right to participate in a class action lawsuit against us.
explanation: Severely limits your legal recourse by preventing collective action.

text: All disputes must be resolved through binding arbitration.
explanation: Forces you out of public courts into private arbitration.

text: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time without prior notice.
explanation: Allows them to change the rules at any time without telling you.

text: You grant us a worldwide, perpetual, irrevocable, royalty-free license to use, modify, and distribute your content.
explanation: You permanently give up essentially all rights to your intellectual property.

text: We may terminate your account at any time, for any reason, without notice or liability.
explanation: Extremely broad termination rights with no protection for the user.

text: We collect your precise geolocation data continuously in the background.
explanation: Highly invasive tracking of your physical location at all times.

text: We are not liable for any damages, even if we were negligent or aware of the possibility.
explanation: Attempts to completely absolve the company of all responsibility, even for negligence.

text: We may read your private messages to improve our advertising algorithms.
explanation: Severe violation of communication privacy for commercial gain.

text: You agree to indemnify and hold us harmless from any claims arising from your use of the service.
explanation: Shifts all legal and financial burden onto the user, even for the platform's failures.

text: We retain the right to collect data from your microphone at any time.
explanation: Extremely invasive surveillance of your offline environment.

text: By using our service, you consent to us sharing your complete browsing history with our affiliates.
explanation: Massive overcollection and sharing of sensitive web activity.
